settings.label: Logo
settings.info: Shown in the header and footer. Falls back to the bundled logo asset when empty.

settings.label: Favicon
settings.info: Falls back to the bundled WebsiteLogo asset when empty.

settings.label: Accent color
settings.info: Used for inline SVG accents (e.g. reassurance checkmarks). Must match the --accent token in theme-2.css — the stylesheet is the source of truth for site-wide colors.

settings.label: Accent color (deep)
settings.info: Keep in sync with --accent-deep in theme-2.css.

settings.label: Background color
settings.info: Sets the browser theme-color meta tag. Keep in sync with --bg in theme-2.css.

settings.label: Text color
settings.info: Keep in sync with --ink in theme-2.css.

settings.label: Founder name
settings.info: Signature on the story and about sections.

settings.label: Shipping line
settings.info: First reassurance line under the buy button.

settings.label: Free shipping note
settings.default: Free shipping on all U.S. orders
settings.info: Second reassurance line; also the fallback for the hero ship badge.

settings.label: Returns line
settings.default: Love it or return it within 30 days
settings.info: Third reassurance line under the buy button.

settings.label: Verification token
settings.info: Paste only the content value from the <meta name=google-site-verification content=...> tag Search Console gives you.

settings.label: Bing verification token
settings.info: Optional. Paste the content value from the msvalidate.01 meta tag.

settings.label: Homepage LCP product handle
settings.info: Used to preload the homepage hero image (cuts LCP). Match the handle of the product pinned to the Hero section.
